CustomField.formula:
IF(TODAY()>= (DATE( YEAR(TODAY()),4,(1*7+1)) - WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(TODAY()),4,8-1))) && TODAY()<= (DATE( YEAR(TODAY()),10,(1*7+1)) - WEEKDAY(DATE(YEAR(TODAY()),10,8-1))),
IF(ISPICKVAL(TimeZoneSidKey,'Australia/Adelaide'), 9.5, (IF(ISPICKVAL(TimeZoneSidKey,'Australia/Brisbane'),10, 10))) , IF(ISPICKVAL(TimeZoneSidKey,'Australia/Adelaide'), 10.5, (IF(ISPICKVAL(TimeZoneSidKey,'Australia/Brisbane'),10, 11))) )
CustomField.label: GMT Offset
